description.value: The creature is insubstantial and cannot be affected by mundane weapons or physical force. It can pass through solid objects at will, including walls, floors, and sealed containers. Only force weapons, psychic powers, Warp-based attacks, or other effects specifically noted as affecting incorporeal creatures can harm it. The creature's own attacks still affect the physical world normally.

system.benefit: Immune to mundane weapons and physical force. Can pass through solid objects. Can only be harmed by force weapons, psychic powers, Warp-based attacks, or effects noted as affecting incorporeal creatures.
